title: First implementation lane
lane_outcome: State the concrete lane-level outcome that advances the parent epic.
purpose_for_parent: State why this lane exists in the parent decomposition.
technical_strategy: State the implementation strategy across slices without putting slice tasks here.

slice_sequence.title: First concrete slice
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: State how this slice advances the lane.
slice_sequence.proof: State the slice proof expectation; exact commands belong in the execplan.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: State what lane work remains after this slice.

acceptance_boundary: State what must be true before this lane can be called complete.
proof_strategy: State how slice proofs aggregate into lane proof.
residual_lane_work: State remaining lane work or 'none' after closeout.
lane_to_epic_contribution: State how this lane advances or closes the parent epic.
